description_long: This chaise features a sleek, modern design with a low, wide seat and a slightly reclined backrest, both covered in a dark, textured upholstery. The frame is constructed from metal, with thin, straight legs and gently curved armrests that extend from the backrest to the front of the seat. The upholstery has a subtle geometric pattern, adding visual interest and a contemporary touch. The seat and backrest appear to be well-padded for comfort, with the cushion integrated into the structure rather than being loose. The overall silhouette is angular yet softened by the curves of the armrests and the gentle slope of the backrest. The color palette is predominantly dark gray and black, with metallic accents on the frame.
description: A modern chaise with dark, textured upholstery, metal frame, and gently curved armrests, featuring a sleek and contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, straight backrest, and both curved armrests, highlighting the geometric upholstery pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the reclined angle of the backrest, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the slender metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid back panel, the tops of the armrests, and the overall boxy silhouette of the chaise.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest curve, seat depth, and the continuous metal frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and slightly reclined, with a continuous, unsegmented surface covered in dark, textured upholstery. It has a clean, modern appearance with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative cutouts.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, which are thin, gently curved, and made of metal, extending from the backrest to the front of the seat.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and metallic, with a simple, modern design and a matte finish. They are positioned at the corners and slightly splay outward for stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a subtle geometric or woven pattern in dark gray tones, giving the surface a textured, contemporary look without any tufting or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, integrated cushion that spans the seat and backrest, appearing thick and well-padded, with no separate or loose cushions visible.
